title: Data Engineer
description: We are looking for a Data Engineer to design and maintain our ETL pipelines. You will work with Python, SQL, Apache Airflow, and AWS S3. Experience with dbt for transformation and Docker for containerization is a strong plus. You will collaborate with the analytics team to deliver clean, reliable data products.

title: Senior Data Engineer
description: Join our platform team to build large-scale batch and streaming pipelines using Apache Spark and Kafka. You will design Snowflake data warehouse schemas and orchestrate workflows with Airflow. Strong Python and SQL skills required. AWS infrastructure experience preferred.

title: Junior Data Engineer
description: We are hiring a Junior Data Engineer to support our data platform team. You will write Python scripts for data ingestion, maintain SQL queries, and learn to use dbt for transformations. No prior experience with Spark required — we will train you. Docker basics are helpful.

title: Backend Engineer
description: We need a Backend Engineer to build and scale our REST APIs using Python and FastAPI. You will design PostgreSQL schemas, write Docker-based microservices, and deploy on AWS. Experience with Kafka for event-driven architecture is a plus. Clean code and test coverage are non-negotiable.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Orbitly is looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to lead the design of our distributed services. You will architect Kafka-based event streams, write high-performance Python services, and maintain our AWS infrastructure with Docker and Kubernetes. Strong SQL and system design skills are essential.

title: Backend Engineer
description: Pazarama e-ticaret platformu için Backend Engineer arıyoruz. Python ve FastAPI ile API geliştirme, PostgreSQL veritabanı tasarımı ve Docker ile deployment yapacaksınız. AWS EC2 ve S3 deneyimi artı sayılır.

title: ML Engineer
description: We are hiring an ML Engineer to productionize machine learning models. You will build feature pipelines in Python with Spark, serve models via REST APIs, and monitor model drift. Experience with Docker, AWS SageMaker, and SQL for feature engineering is required. Airflow for pipeline scheduling is a plus.

title: Senior ML Engineer
description: Vaultex is looking for a Senior ML Engineer to own our model training and serving infrastructure. You will design Kafka-based real-time feature pipelines, train large models on AWS, and orchestrate workflows with Airflow. Python and Spark are daily tools. Snowflake experience preferred for offline feature stores.

title: Junior ML Engineer
description: Mindvault is hiring a Junior ML Engineer to assist in model development and evaluation. You will write Python code for data preprocessing, train baseline models, and document experiments. SQL skills for querying feature tables are required. Docker is used for reproducible environments.

title: Data Analyst
description: We are looking for a Data Analyst to transform raw sales data into actionable insights. You will write SQL queries against our Snowflake data warehouse, build dashboards in Tableau, and use dbt for data modeling. Python for ad-hoc analysis is a plus. No engineering background required.

title: Senior Data Analyst
description: FinSight is hiring a Senior Data Analyst to lead reporting and self-service analytics initiatives. You will own our dbt models in Snowflake, define KPI frameworks, and mentor junior analysts. Advanced SQL is essential. Python for scripting and AWS Athena experience are strongly preferred.

title: Data Analyst
description: HepsiBurada bünyesine Veri Analisti arıyoruz. SQL ve Python kullanarak büyük veri kümelerini analiz edecek, iş birimlerine raporlar sunacak ve Snowflake üzerinde sorgular yazacaksınız. dbt ve Tableau deneyimi tercih sebebidir.
